summary: Solid performance featuring a Rolling Stones opener and strong Dead classics; recording quality not described
review: The lone fan review praises the show’s setlist, highlighting the "Gimme Shelter" opener, a fiery "Midnight Rambler" with guest Jimmy Page, and an enthusiastic encore of "Sugar Magnolia." No comments are made about the audio source or fidelity, so the recording quality remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review; positive remarks about the performance but no information on recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or any audio issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer lists songs in order and expresses enthusiasm for the opener, mid‑set highlight with Jimmy Page, and a high‑energy encore.
